de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl

Class SpecificationInjector.JMLFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl.SpecificationInjector.JMLFactory
  • Enclosing class:
    SpecificationInjector

    private static class SpecificationInjector.JMLFactory
extends Object
    Produces JML* respects clauses. Clauses are internally labeled with keys (resulting from security domains in RIFL), which are discarded in the final output.
    Author:
    bruns
